subject: 📊 Is your CPA ready for your books?
previewText: Stop guessing your inventory value. Get audit-ready reports in one click.
intro_text:
Hi {{ contact.firstname }},

 

Inventory is often the biggest question mark on a ranch's balance sheet. With Ambrook, your cattle, feed, and grain are tracked in real-time, meaning your CPA gets a clean, accurate report without the back-and-forth spreadsheets. No more 'best guesses'—just audit-ready data.
secondary_text: We are certain that a quick glance at the new inventory capabilities will surprise and delight you.
